reviews.review_description: Yesterday i opened the game, and was about to join a code "J", but i got banned for inappropriate room code. The only codes that i was playing in was "P", my private room code and "J", the one with many players. When i opened the game i was banned for one hour, i thought it was just a bug and waited. Then, today i got banned again for 28 hours, the reason was for VPN/PROXY. WHAT is proxy means and i don't even know how to download vpn on the headset. Sadly i do not have a discord account to tell admins about the mistake, so im telling about it here. Fix it pls

I understand that the game got shut down but what was the purpose it’s actually stupid they removed all the gorilla tag assets and they still do it they have the brain level of a bag of rocks not hating on the game but meta🤬🤬🤬🤬🤬

I was in a code with 3 of my friends chilling in volcano until some random dude screamed the N word over and over. I didn’t really care about it until this kid came up to me and said he was gonna report me for saying the N word. Me and my friends tried telling him it wasn’t me. But the kid did not care and reported me into the discord for saying the N word. The video he sent was 2 secs long and he wasn’t even in the same lobby as me when he took the video. But one of the admins still terminated my account. My 3 friends tried to get this sorted out with the admin but he called one of my friends a Bit## and banned all 4 of us and banned us from the discord.                                                                           Would not recommend this to anyone. The owner still texts my friends hurtful messages to this moment.              .                                                                     This game deserves -5 stars but I could only put 1 star.                                    I hope this game fails due to mean admins and lazy developers

developer_response.body: Our moderators would absolutely NEVER call somebody anything offense or hateful. This is false and you are most likely lying. I have NEVER, NEVER EVER sent hateful messages towards somebody unless THEY had been hateful. Either way, it would be more of a, "This is wrong, don't do this again" instead of anything actually rude. The owner is "TH3Snowy" if it somebody else, that is not me. If you can DM me, we can sort this out more.

reviews.review_description: Just so you know everyone, the game has been copyrighted and it says it has been violating metas terms and conditions and that’s why everyone is banned hope this helped!

This game has gotten such a good revamp and the new models and assets are so much fun to play in! This whole experience feels so real and scary, definitely a good game to play with a group.. And especially SCARY when you play alone.

Good graphics, models, and vibe.

reviews.review_title: it's not like the old game
reviews.review_description:
the old game was very fun and it was super scary but now it just feels like the normal gorilla tag horror game. i get it i know you got copyrighted and that you can't control that but you can still keep all things from the old game just make them i know other people also wanted the revamp too but still like you completely change the spawn area which no one knows how to navigate nothing's even scary anymore it looks like a child drew all the pictures 
it's just nothing like the old game and i miss it so sorry snowy but just no.

reviews.review_title: Why did it get taken down twice
reviews.review_description: I loved this game back in October 2025 but in February when is got taken down I was devestated but when the revamp came out I was super happy to play it but now it’s been taken down AGAIN but overall best vr horror game I’ve ever played I really hope I can play it again soon 5 star

Peak game been waiting for weeks since the shutdown just some slight problems too dark either make the map a little brighter or change the flashlight but still peak game also fix moderation please soooo many people get banned due to lousy moderators not taking jokes just fire them or smth

This is the most fun I’ve had in a horror game. The players are fun to be around with and there are a variety of maps to choose from. There are also summonings you could do in certain maps which I find really cool. This game is really horrifying because the monster chases you at high speeds.

Overall, 10/10 game

reviews.review_title: bad staff and horrible game + moderation
reviews.review_description: Got unfairly muted in the fearing gorilla vc just because alex mason probably thought i was swearing when i was talking about munkr funkr. The game also doesnt have the old charm it used to have with the gtag assets and the game just feels more of your average sloppy gorilla tag fangame that only exists for money so the owner can get tons of money and run away. This game has began to suck after the dimensional fright update where the updates became even worse. This isnt supposed to be rude in any way this is just me giving my honest opinion about a game i used to love and play. And before i finish this review off to snowy no i do not think you barely put any effort into this game i can see how much you care for the game and hope you enjoy your choices for this game. Also about the moderation, basically someone started swearing in game and got me in trouble and didnt get banned

reviews.review_title: I will always remember this game
reviews.review_description: I love playing this game.I just wish this game never got took down.Because now I can't even play it unless I play offline.I will always remember you fearing gorilla.But gorilla tag , I hate you , and the owner

Yo i played this game since a week after it came out. This game is so fun and i love how i would randomly hear screams everytime i join a server. Devs probably wont see this but if they do, i want to say something. Thank you so much for making this game, before this i played things like big scary and scary baboon but they were NEVER fun, nor scary. And ever since, i got bored of vr and stopped playing. Till i heard a game on youtube called “fearing gorilla”. As soon as i got it everything was so scary. I would hesitate to go in specific areas, try to stay with large groups, and for me, i wasnt always fast. I always wonder how people did the “tracking glitch” because i was on a quest 2. But for a average quest 2 player, im pretty fast. And now that this update is here, im so glad it got a revamp and not just tooken down for copying gorilla tag assets. Thank you so much for not giving up on the fearing gorilla community and us gorillas hope for more fun and scary updates.

developer_response.body: You are warned when you start up the game. You agreed towards the fact that the game includes "JUMPSCARES, LOUD NOISES, and FLICKERING LIGHTS". Also, it is meant to be difficult, you can always teleport to the next level after beating it.

reviews.review_description: Ive been playing this game since the release. The game is scary, terrifying, super fun. It even has summonnings which makes it even better. Quality is excellent, monsters are much more scarier now. If you play alone, it feels super scary. There is a lot of maps, different monsters. There is even Dreamcore, Wonderland. The cosmetics are good too! I highly recommend playing. In my opinion best scary game. I give this game a 10/10 . Absolutely fun.

this game sucks, everything about it when i join codes my friends they  can’t even see me, yall delayed the game so much, playing this was a waste of time, yall hyped up this game so much just for it to have so many glitches and things not fixed.

developer_response.body: So sorry! We were actually being rushed but misunderstandings are alright. These have been fixed.

developer_response.body: I am a solo developer besides a few modelers (they only make monsters and maybe a couple of cosmetics). I need mental health breaks, I do not have time for many things due to personal issues in my life. The April Fools update included much more. Please do not assume things, thank you.
